subcodes.first_line: O thou distinguished one endowed with divine virtues! His honour Ibtihaj hath written that, like unto a lamp within a glass in Gilan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفاضل الرحمانی جناب ابتهاج مرقوم نموده اند که مانند سراج در زجاج گیلان
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @effort; striving, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
